label: Transparent Lithops motif source
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a living stone plant (Lithops) motif for a Morphous design system, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A single Lithops living stone plant pair with rounded split pebble-like leaves, natural stone-grey and warm tan mottling, a narrow green fissure, subtle translucent plant skin, and Namib gravel mineral character. Accurate botanical form, compact succulent body, tactile matte surface.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop the plant. The subject should occupy most of the canvas while leaving clean margins.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves natural stone texture, muted desert neutrals, minimal object-system mood.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no soil pot, no landscape, no gravel field, no flower, no extra plants, no text, no watermark, no decorative background, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Lithops" derived from the visible transparent Lithops living stone plant motif.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the visible motif image: stone grey pebble skin, warm tan mottling, muted green fissure, pale succulent translucency, and Namib gravel neutrals. Use only motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals from the motif. This board is the primary reference for coding a minimal object system.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 source board, 3840 x 2160 px, crisp high-resolution UI mockup.
Resolution and legibility: large readable labels, no tiny dense token text; sections should remain legible in gallery previews.
Required visible sections: Morphous Lithops title, motif story, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples with Geist and Noto Sans JP guidance; short readable snippets only.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command/search overlay, sidebar navigation, top navigation, metric cards, compact charts, empty/loading/error states, token chips, texture samples, spacing scale, radius scale, border and shadow samples.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-like product design system, precise minimal object grid, calm utilitarian dashboard surface, 8px radii, fine gravel borders, subtle speckled lithops texture, tactile stone controls, restrained green fissure focus states.
Color palette: stone grey, chalk grey, warm tan, Namib gravel beige, fissure green, olive shadow, charcoal mineral ink; no unrelated saturated colors.
Text: use short readable labels and exact section names; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no generic purple/blue gradients, no bright marketing palette, no random brand names, no watermark, no illegible microtext, no rounded pills larger than 8px radius, no landscape scene.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode version of the visible "Morphous Lithops" design-system board. It must feel like the same minimal object system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the visible transparent Lithops motif and the visible light-mode board as references. Preserve the lithops-derived palette roles, component language, texture, 8px radius system, Japanese typography guidance, and shadcn/tweakcn UI coverage.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 source board, 3840 x 2160 px, crisp high-resolution UI mockup.
Resolution and legibility: large readable labels, no tiny dense token text; sections should remain legible in gallery previews.
Required visible sections: Morphous Lithops title, Dark Mode, motif story, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Generated Assets.
Visual details: deep mineral charcoal background, dark warm gravel surfaces, pale stone-grey text, chalk-grey cards, muted tan dividers, restrained fissure-green primary controls and focus rings, olive shadow accents, subtle speckled lithops texture overlays, crisp fine borders.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command/search overlay, sidebar navigation, top navigation, metric cards, compact charts, empty/loading/error states, token chips, texture samples, spacing scale, radius scale, border and shadow samples.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples with Geist and Noto Sans JP guidance; short readable snippets only.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-like product design system, precise minimal object grid, calm utilitarian dashboard surface, 8px radii, tactile stone controls.
Text: use short readable labels and exact section names; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no neon colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no flat pure-black-only background, no unrelated saturated colors, no random brand names, no watermark, no illegible microtext, no rounded pills larger than 8px radius, no landscape scene.
